records.techniqueSummary: Official-control sampling and analysis governance for cadmium levels in foodstuffs.
records.lodSummary: Import rows should preserve lod when available for method-review traceability.
records.loqSummary: Import rows should preserve loq where reported to support lower-bound and review context.
records.recoverySummary: Recovery information should be retained where available to support analytical review context.
records.measurementUncertaintySummary: Measurement uncertainty should be retained where available for official-control review context.
records.storageStabilitySummary: Storage-stability evidence is external to this pack and should be linked separately when available.
records.samplingPlanSummary: Sampling-plan context follows the governed EU official-control regulation and linked EFSA review material.
notes: Preserves analytical-method context for cadmium review and monitoring import checks.
Dietary MCP does not execute this method; it records its governed review context.

Structured method metadata is intentionally sparse here and should not be mistaken for a fully curated PFAS analytical method dossier.
